   "source": [
    "# plt.plot(x,y) ----> Line plot\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "x = [1,2,3,4]\n",
    "y= [4,5,6,7]\n",
    "plt.plot(x,y)\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "4d9d0cf7",
   "metadata": {},

   "source": [
    "# real data\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "oscar_movies  = [\n",
    "    \"the dark knight\",\n",
    "    \"the hurt locker\",\n",
    "    \"the kings speech\",\n",
    "    \"the artist\",\n",
    "    \"argo\"\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "years = [2008,2009,2010,2011,2012]\n",
    "oscar_revenue  = [1005,170,427,133,232]\n",
    "\n",
    "#plot\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.plot(years,oscar_revenue)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.title(\"oscar movie revenue each year\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"years\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"revenue is sm\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "4c4500ee",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<matplotlib.legend.Legend at 0x176226ae120>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 12,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "#non _oscar movies winner\n",
    "non_oscar_movies = [\"stunning millstone\",\"avatar\",\"inception\",\"hugo\",\"linclon\"]\n",
    "non_oscar_revenue = [378,2788,829,185,275]\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.plot(years,oscar_revenue,\"--ro\",label = \"oscar_movies\")\n",
    "plt.plot(years,non_oscar_revenue,color = \"b\" ,marker = \">\",linestyle = \"--\",linewidth = 4,label = \"non_oscar_movies\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.title(\"oscar_movies vs non_oscar_movies\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"year\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"revenue in sm\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 19,
   "id": "21270a9c",
   "metadata": {},

   ],
   "source": [
    "plt.plot(years,oscar_revenue,label = \"oscar_movies\")\n",
    "plt.plot(years,non_oscar_revenue,label = \"non_oscar_movies\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.title(\"oscar_movies vs non_oscar_movies\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"year\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"revenue in sm\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.style.available\n",
    "plt.style.use(\"dark_background\")\n",
    "plt.grid()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n"
   ]

   "source": [
    "with plt.xkcd():\n",
    "    plt.plot(years,oscar_revenue,label = \"oscar_movies\")\n",
    "plt.plot(years,non_oscar_revenue,label = \"non_oscar_movies\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.title(\"oscar_movies vs non_oscar_movies\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"year\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"revenue in sm\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.style.available\n",
    "plt.style.use(\"dark_background\")\n",
    "plt.grid()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]

   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "oscar_movies  = [\n",
    "    \"the dark knight\",\n",
    "    \"the hurt locker\",\n",
    "    \"the kings speech\",\n",
    "    \"the artist\",\n",
    "    \"argo\"\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "years = [2008,2009,2010,2011,2012]\n",
    "oscar_revenue  = [1005,170,427,133,678]\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.plot(oscar_movies,oscar_revenue)\n",
    "plt.title(\"movies revenue\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"movies\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"revenue (sm)\")\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.savefig(\"final_plot.png\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {

   ],
   "source": [
    "  #2.plt.bar(x,height) ---> vertical bar plot  x= categorical data , y = value\n",
    "\n",
    "# vertical barchat\n",
    "\n",
    "oscar_movies  = [\n",
    "    \"the dark knight\",\n",
    "    \"the hurt locker\",\n",
    "    \"the kings speech\",\n",
    "    \"the artist\",\n",
    "    \"argo\"\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "years = [2008,2009,2010,2011,2012]\n",
    "oscar_revenue  = [1005,170,427,133,678]\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.bar(oscar_movies,oscar_revenue,label = \"xyz\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.title(\"revenue of each year\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"year\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"revenue in sm\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.text\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 30,
   "id": "debbaa81",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# plt.text(x-axis pos ,y-axis pos , text,allignment)\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "oscar_movies  = [\n",
    "    \"the dark knight\",\n",
    "    \"the hurt locker\",\n",
    "    \"the kings speech\",\n",
    "    \"the artist\",\n",
    "    \"argo\"\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "years = [2008,2009,2010,2011,2012]\n",
    "oscar_revenue  = [1005,170,427,133,678]\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.bar(years,oscar_revenue,label = \"xyz\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.title(\"revenue of each year\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"year\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"revenue in sm\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.text\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "for i in range(len(years)):\n",
    "    plt.text(years[i],oscar_revenue[i]+20 , str(oscar_revenue[i]),ha = \"center\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "# xlim(lower,upper) , ylim()\n",
    "\n",
    "oscar_movies  = [\n",
    "    \"the dark knight\",\n",
    "    \"the hurt locker\",\n",
    "    \"the kings speech\",\n",
    "    \"the artist\",\n",
    "    \"argo\"\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "years = [2008,2009,2010,2011,2012]\n",
    "oscar_revenue  = [1005,170,427,133,678]\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.bar(years,oscar_revenue,label = \"xyz\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.title(\"revenue of each year\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"year\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"revenue in sm\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.text\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "for i in range(len(years)):\n",
    "    plt.text(years[i],oscar_revenue[i]+20 , str(oscar_revenue[i]),ha = \"center\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.ylim(0,max(oscar_revenue)+100)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "#compare multiple set of data\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "oscar_movies  = [\n",
    "    \"the dark knight\",\n",
    "    \"the hurt locker\",\n",
    "    \"the kings speech\",\n",
    "    \"the artist\",\n",
    "    \"argo\"\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "years = [2008,2009,2010,2011,2012]\n",
    "oscar_revenue  = [1005,170,427,133,678]\n",
    "\n",
    "non_oscar_movies = [\"stunning millstone\",\"avatar\",\"inception\",\"hugo\",\"linclon\"]\n",
    "non_oscar_revenue = [378,2788,829,185,275]\n",
    "\n",
    "width = 0.4\n",
    "x = np.arange(len(years))\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.bar(x-width/2,oscar_revenue,width,label = \"oscar_movies\") # shifting left  \n",
    "plt.bar(x+width/2,non_oscar_revenue,width,label = \"non_oscarmovies\") # shifting right\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.title(\"oscar vs non_oscar movies revenue\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"year\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"revenue ($m)\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "# for 3 values = width = 0.25\n",
    "x-width ,x ,x+width"
   ]
  },

    "# Scatter  plot\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "age  = [22,25,30,35,40,45,50,55,60,65]\n",
    "\n",
    "bp = [110,115,120,122,125,130,135,123,145,150]\n",
    "\n",
    "colors = [\"green\" if x > 135 else \"red\" for x in bp]\n",
    "plt.scatter(age,bp,color = colors ,s = bp,marker=\"o\",alpha =0.5)\n",
    "plt.title(\"age vs bp\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"age\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"bp\")"

    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",

    "people = [\"person a\",\"person b\",\"person c\",\"person d\",\"person e\"\n",

    "\n",
    "age  = [22,25,30,35,40,45,50,55,60,65]\n",
    "\n",
    "bp = [110,115,120,122,125,130,135,123,145,150]\n",
    "\n",
    "colors = [\"green\" if x > 135 else \"red\" for x in bp]\n",
    "plt.scatter(age,bp,s = bp , cmap = \"plasma\",c = bp)\n",
    "plt.title(\"age vs bp\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"age\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"bp\")\n",
    "plt.colorbar(label = bp)\n",

    "# annotaions plt.annotate(\"text\",xy = (x_point,y_point),xytext = (x_text,y_text))\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "pepole = [\"person a\",\"person b\",\"person c\",\"person d\",\"person e\"\n",
    "          ,\"person f\",\"person g\",\"person h\",\"person i\",\"person j\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "age  = [22,25,30,35,40,45,50,55,60,65]\n",
    "\n",
    "bp = [110,115,120,122,125,130,135,123,145,150]\n",
    "\n",
    "colors = [\"green\" if x > 135 else \"red\" for x in bp]\n",
    "plt.scatter(age,bp,s = bp , cmap = \"plasma\",c = bp)\n",
    "plt.title(\"age vs bp\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"age\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"bp\")\n",
    "plt.colorbar(label = \"Bp\")\n",
    "plt.grid()\n",
    "\n",
    "for i in range(len(pepole)):\n",
    "    plt.annotate(pepole[i],xy = (age[i],bp[i]),xytext =(age[i]+1,bp[i]+1) )\n",
    "plt.xlim(min(age),max(age)+10)\n",
    "plt.ylim(min(bp),max(bp)+5)"
   ]

    "# multiple plots\n",
    "\n",
    "cities = [\"city a\",\"city b\",\"city c\",\"city d\",\"city e\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "# winter : Tempreture vs huidity\n",
    "\n",
    "winter_temp = [5,2,10,0,7]\n",
    "\n",
    "winter_humidity = [80,75,65,85,70]\n",
    "\n",
    "# summer : tempreture vs humidity\n",
    "\n",
    "summer_temp = [25,30,28,35,27]\n",
    "\n",
    "summer_humidity = [60,50,55,45,65]\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.scatter(winter_temp,winter_humidity,label = \"winter\")\n",
    "plt.scatter(summer_temp,summer_humidity,label=\"summer\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"tempreture\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"humidity\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.legend()"
   ]

    "# pie chart\n",
    "\n",
    "expensess = [\"salaries\",\"rent\",\"marketing\",\"r&d\",\"miscelenous\"]\n",
    "amounts =  [500,150,120,100,50]\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.style.use(\"classic\")\n",
    "plt.style.available\n",
    "plt.pie(amounts,labels =expensess,autopct = \"%1.1f%%\",\n",
    "        wedgeprops= {\n",
    "            \"edgecolor\" : \"black\",\n",
    "            \"linewidth\" : 2,\n",
    "            \"linestyle\" : \"--\",\n",
    "            \"alpha\" : 0.5,\n",
    "            \n",
    "            \n",
    "        })\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]

   "source": [
    "expensess = [\"salaries\",\"rent\",\"marketing\",\"r&d\",\"miscelenous\"]\n",
    "amounts =  [500,150,120,100,50]\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.style.use(\"classic\")\n",
    "\n",
    "explode = [0,0,0.2,0,0]\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.pie(amounts,labels =expensess,autopct = \"%1.1f%%\",\n",
    "        wedgeprops= {\n",
    "            \"edgecolor\" : \"black\",\n",
    "            \"linewidth\" : 2,\n",
    "            \"linestyle\" : \"--\"\n",
    "            \n",
    "            \n",
    "        },\n",
    "        explode= explode,\n",
    "        startangle= 90,\n",
    "        shadow=  True)\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
